title: L’univers est créé (The Universe Is Being Created), from the Noa Noa Suite
medium: Wood-block print, printed twice in black and brown inks, with selective wiping, and hand-applied orange, yellow, red, two tones of green, two tones of blue, silver-gray and black watercolor, on cream wove Japanese paper laid down on cream laid Japanese paper (a laminate made by the artist)
creditLine: Art Institute of Chicago. Clarence Buckingham Collection
